nodes.name: Every Monday 6am
nodes.notes: Runs every Monday at 6am UTC. Adjust the cron expression to change timing.

nodes.name: Get Active Tracked Areas
nodes.notes: Fetches all active tracked_areas from Supabase. Uses the service role key so RLS does not filter results.

nodes.name: Deduplicate Councils
nodes.notes: Cost-efficiency step. One scrape per council regardless of how many users track it.

nodes.name: Get Council Portal URL
nodes.notes: Looks up portal_url and portal_type for this council from the councils table.

nodes.name: Prepare Scrape Parameters
nodes.notes: Builds the date range and passes portal_type through so the IF node can route correctly.

nodes.name: Servlet Portal?
nodes.notes: Routes to the correct scrape+parse branch. True = old servlet portal (POST). False = newer search.do portal (GET).

nodes.name: Scrape: POST Servlet
nodes.notes: POSTs a date-range search to the servlet portal. No address filter — returns all applications for the council in the period.

nodes.name: Scrape: GET Search.do
nodes.notes: GETs the standard Idox search.do endpoint. Used by most modern councils.

nodes.name: Parse: Servlet HTML
nodes.notes: Positional column parser for servlet-based Idox portals (Staffordshire Moorlands, Haringey, etc).

nodes.name: Parse: Search.do HTML
nodes.notes: CSS-class parser for modern Idox search.do portals (Westminster, Camden, etc).

nodes.name: Skip If No Applications
nodes.notes: Drops councils with 0 applications — no point hitting the webhook with nothing to store.

nodes.name: Send to PlanningPing Webhook
nodes.notes: POSTs scraped applications to the Next.js webhook. The webhook deduplicates via state_hash before writing to Supabase.

meta.notes: Before activating, set these n8n Variables (Settings → Variables): SUPABASE_URL, SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY, PLANNINGPING_WEBHOOK_URL (e.g. https://your-domain.com/api/webhooks/n8n), WEBHOOK_SECRET. Also run supabase/migration_portal_type.sql to add the portal_type column.
